effects_provenance.raw: White Runtz THCA Flower Essential / 28g Strain Profile White Runtz THCA Flower is a potent hybrid bred from Gelato crossed with Zkittlez . The genetics produce buds distinguished by their striking white trichome coverage — literally snow-coated jars — paired with the candy-fruit aromatic profile the broader Runtz family is famous for. Premium bag appeal at first glance. Effects White Runtz delivers an enduring, deeply pleasant experience that pairs euphoric cerebral relaxation with a tingling, full-body ease. The high lasts — long-plateau effects that suit late-afternoon decompression, evening social use, or any setting where flavor character and reliability are the appeal. Flavor & Aroma On the palate: sweet candy and ripe fruit up front, with a creamy gelato middle and a smooth, sugary finish on the exhale. Smoke is silky and unmistakably dessert-leaning. The terpene profile reads candy-and-cream — see the COA for the exact terpene breakdown of the current batch. Lab Tested — View the COA Every White Runtz harvest is third-party tested for cannabinoid content, terpenes, residual solvents, pesticides, and heavy metals. Download the White Runtz THCA Flower Certificate of Analysis for full test results. Tiers Explained Our three quality tiers are: Supreme — Hand-selected top-shelf buds with the densest structure, highest trichome coverage, and strongest terpene expression. Preferred — Premium-grade flower at a balanced price, using the same genetics and cultivation with a slightly broader bud selection. Essential — Our value tier, using the same strain and lab testing with smaller or more uniform buds. Federally Compliant Hemp Lit Farms White Runtz THCA Flower is hemp-derived and federally compliant under the 2018 Farm Bill — containing less than 0.3% Δ9-THC by dry weight at harvest. Must be 21+ to purchase. Not for sale in jurisdictions where THCA flower is restricted. Explore our full THCA Flower collection for more strains. Cream Fruit hybrid Sweet THCA Flower Lost In Translation

effects_provenance.raw: Black Cherry Funk - THCA Flower - Indoor Top Cut Exotic 28 grams Black Cherry Funk – Indica-Dominant Hybrid Cannabis Strain Black Cherry Funk is an indica-dominant hybrid celebrated for its rich, fruity aroma with pronounced notes of cherry and earthiness combined with a subtle funk undertone. This strain offers a flavorful experience alongside deeply calming and soothing effects. Type: Indica-Dominant Hybrid Cannabis Strain for Relaxation and Stress Relief As an indica-dominant hybrid, Black Cherry Funk delivers relaxing physical effects paired with a gentle cerebral calm, making it perfect for unwinding, easing tension, and promoting restful moments. Black Cherry Funk Terpene Profile – Fruity, Earthy, Cherry, and Funky Aromas The primary terpenes are: Myrcene: Earthy and herbal notes contributing to relaxation and sedation. Caryophyllene: Spicy, peppery aroma with anti-inflammatory and calming benefits. Limonene: Fruity citrus scent that uplifts mood and alleviates stress. Humulene: Woody and herbal fragrance supporting anti-inflammatory effects. These terpenes blend to create Black Cherry Funk’s signature fruity and earthy aroma with hints of cherry and funk. Effects of Black Cherry Funk – Soothing Body Relaxation with Mild Mental Clarity Black Cherry Funk offers profound body relaxation that eases muscle tension and anxiety, paired with a mild cerebral effect that keeps the mind gently clear and focused. Ideal for evening use and managing stress. Experience the flavorful and calming effects of Black Cherry Funk — an indica-dominant hybrid designed to relax your body and soothe your mind. effects_provenance.raw: Garlic Cocktail THCa Flower 1g - Type 1 THCa What is Garlic Cocktail THCa Flower Strain? Savor the unique blend of Garlic Cocktail THCa Flower , an indica dominant hybrid strain (70% indica/30% sativa) born from the aromatic fusion of GMO and Mimosa. This strain earns its name from its distinctive flavor profile and potent genetic lineage, making it a must-try for any indica aficionado. Garlic Cocktail delivers a delightful mix of heavy herbal garlic taste, punctuated by a sharp citrus burst of tangerine on the exhale. The scent is equally captivating, featuring a dominant garlicky note, enhanced by hints of sour tangerines, spicy dank, and a touch of rich anise. Garlic Cocktail Terpenes The terpene composition of Garlic Cocktail adds depth to its sensory experience: Limonene : Infuses a zesty citrus scent, uplifting the mood and complementing the garlic with its stress-relieving properties. Caryophyllene: Offers a spicy, peppery aroma, enriching the garlic and citrus flavors while possibly providing anti-inflammatory benefits. Pinene : Contributes to the strain's piney, herbal notes, potentially aiding in alertness and memory retention. These terpenes not only define the aromatic and taste profile of Garlic Cocktail but also contribute to its overall therapeutic effects. Garlic Cocktail Strain Cannabinoids THCA: 23.89% Total Cannabinoids: 25.74% D9-THC: 0.18% Garlic Cocktail THCA Strain Effects Garlic Cocktail's effects are potent, setting in a few minutes post-inhalation, enveloping your mind in a wave of happy calm. It promotes a sense of bliss and uplifted mood, washing away any negative thoughts. Mental tranquility fosters creativity and sociability, making it great for social settings without overwhelming sedation. Physically, it induces a soothing relaxation, ideal for those seeking relief without deep sedation. With its high THCa content, Garlic Cocktail is particularly suitable for experienced users dealing with pain, inflammation, cramps, muscle spasms, and stress. Genotype: Garlic Cocktail (GMO x Mimosa) Phenotype: Garlic Cocktail This bud features fat, conical, minty green nugs with long, thin orange hairs and tiny, sparkling white crystal trichomes. Hemp Flower contains less than .3% Delta 9 THC For Adult Use Only Already vibin’??? 👉Might as well explore the full THCa Hemp flower collection. OR... 👉Check out our CBD Hemp flower collection for a SMOOTHER vibe. Caryophyllene Day Delta-9 THC

effects_provenance.raw: Green Crack THCa Flower 1g - Type 1 THCa What is Green Crack THCa Flower Strain? Green Crack THCa Flower , often referred to by the less controversial name "Green Crush" or "Mango Crack," is a potent sativa-dominant hybrid strain born from the cross of Skunk #1 with an unknown indica. This strain is beloved for its energizing effects that keep you focused and motivated throughout the day. With a tangy, fruity flavor reminiscent of sweet mango, Green Crack is a daytime favorite for those looking to combat fatigue, stress, and low energy. Green Crack Strain Terpenes The terpene profile of Green Crack significantly contributes to its sensory appeal and effects: Myrcene : The most abundant terpene, it imparts an earthy, musky aroma, potentially enhancing the strain's relaxing yet uplifting effects. Caryophyllene: Offers a spicy, peppery note, enriching the flavor profile while possibly providing anti-inflammatory benefits. Pinene: Adds a refreshing pine scent, which may help with alertness and memory, counterbalancing the sedative qualities of Myrcene. These terpenes work together to create Green Crack's distinctive aroma and are key to its energizing and mood-enhancing properties. Green Crack Strain Cannabinoids THCA: 33.25% Total Cannabinoids: 34.64% D9-THC: 0.18% Green Crack THCA Strain Effects Green Crack delivers an invigorating mental buzz, known for its ability to sharpen focus and increase energy levels. It's perfect for daytime use when you need to get things done, be creative, or simply enjoy an uplifted mood without the drowsiness often associated with cannabis. The strain's effects are cerebral, promoting a sense of well-being, creativity, and motivation, making it a go-to for those battling lethargy or mental fog. Genotype: Green Crack (Skunk #1 x Unknown Indica) Phenotype: Green Crack Hemp Flower contains less than .3% Delta 9 THC For Adult Use Only Already vibin’??? 👉Might as well explore the full THCa Hemp flower collection. effects_provenance.raw: Tahoe OG THCa Weight: 14g Tahoe OG THCa tests at 33.43% THCa, a legendary OG Kush phenotype that brings true old-school nighttime power at the top of the potency chart. The effects come on fast and heavy, opening with a euphoric head rush that melts stress on contact. The high then sinks into the body, building a deep, weighted relaxation that loosens every muscle on the way down. It settles into a classic OG couch-lock that makes staying up late feel like a lot of work. It’s the perfect strain for the end of the night, deep relaxation, and closing out heavy days. 33.43% total THCa 34.37% total cannabinoids Indica Dom. effects_provenance.raw: Cake Bomb THCA Flower Essential / 28g Strain Profile Cake Bomb THCA Flower is an indica-dominant hybrid bred from Do-Si-Dos crossed with PCS1 . The cross delivers a richly dessert-rich aromatic profile with the dense, dark-toned bud structure Do-Si-Dos genetics are known for — visually premium, deeply flavored, structurally serious. Effects Cake Bomb delivers a potent body high complemented by calming mental euphoria. The onset is steady and the body settles fully; the head stays warmly engaged rather than racing. Best reserved for evening use, post-dinner unwinding, or any setting where flavor character paired with real depth is the appeal. Flavor & Aroma On the palate: sweet vanilla up front, with creamy cake notes through the middle and a subtle warm-spice finish on the exhale. Smoke is full and unmistakably bakery-rich. The terpene profile reads vanilla-cream-and-spice — see the COA for the exact terpene breakdown of the current batch. Lab Tested — View the COA Every Cake Bomb harvest is third-party tested for cannabinoid content, terpenes, residual solvents, pesticides, and heavy metals. Download the Cake Bomb THCA Flower Certificate of Analysis for full test results. Tiers Explained Our three quality tiers are: Supreme — Hand-selected top-shelf buds with the densest structure, highest trichome coverage, and strongest terpene expression. Preferred — Premium-grade flower at a balanced price, using the same genetics and cultivation with a slightly broader bud selection. Essential — Our value tier, using the same strain and lab testing with smaller or more uniform buds. Federally Compliant Hemp Lit Farms Cake Bomb THCA Flower is hemp-derived and federally compliant under the 2018 Farm Bill — containing less than 0.3% Δ9-THC by dry weight at harvest. Must be 21+ to purchase. Not for sale in jurisdictions where THCA flower is restricted. Explore our full THCA Flower collection for more strains. effects_provenance.raw: Colombian Gold THCa Flower 1g - Type 1 THCa Shop for Colombian Gold THCa Flower Colombian Gold THCa Flower is a legendary landrace sativa known for its uplifting energy and sharp citrus profile. Born in the Santa Marta mountains of Colombia, this classic strain delivers a bright, focused high with old-school character and powerful potency. With over 30% THCa, Colombian Gold is built for those who want clear mental stimulation, creative drive, and daytime performance without heavy body sedation. Colombian Gold THCa Flower Highlights Type : Sativa Landrace Origin : Santa Marta Mountains, Colombia Dominant Terpenes : Terpinolene, Terpineol, Caryophyllene, Ocimene Flavors : Lemon, lime, sweet citrus, woody skunk Aroma : Earthy, pine, skunky citrus, sweet lime zest THCa : 30.3% Effects : Active, uplifting, focused, euphoric Usage : Ideal for daytime or productive sessions What is Colombian Gold Strain? Colombian Gold Strain, also known as Santa Marta Colombian Gold, is a classic landrace sativa that gained massive popularity in the United States during the 1960s. Cultivated in the high-altitude climate of Colombia, it became known for its energetic high and citrus-heavy terpene profile. This strain produces fluffy, crystal-coated buds with vibrant aroma and a clear, motivating effect that stands apart from heavier modern hybrids. Colombian Gold Strain Effects Colombian Gold delivers a fast-acting cerebral lift that sharpens focus and enhances mood. It is best suited for daytime use when you want clarity, conversation, or creative output. This high-THCa cultivar produces dense, frosty buds coated in a thick layer of trichomes, making it a top choice among connoisseurs. effects_provenance.raw: Quattro Kush THCa Flower 14G Quattro Kush THCa Flower Strain Quattro Kush is an Indica-dominant hybrid THCa strain known for its potent effects and robust flavors. It is a cross between three notable strains: 707 Headband x Triangle Kush x SFV OG Kush. The breeders behind this strain are Ethos Genetics. Quattro Kush THCa Flower made its appearance on the market through their efforts. Indica-dominant strains are typically associated with relaxation and sedation; Quattro Kush aligns with this profile. It leans heavily towards the indica side effects, offering a calming and relaxing experience. Click here for COA Appearance The appearance of Quattro Kush buds showcases the typical traits associated with indica strains. They tend to be dense and compact, often tightly packed. The flowers are typically vibrant green in color, adorned with a generous covering of trichomes that give them a frosty appearance. The strain may also feature hints of purple or orange, adding to its visual appeal. Aroma/Flavor Quattro Kush exhibits a complex and enticing aroma derived from its parent strains. The scent is spicy and skunky, with hints of diesel inherited from the 707 Headband. The earthy scents of Triangle Kush help mellow out the overall aroma. At the same time, SFV OG Kush contributes fresher citrus and pine flavors. The flavor profile of Quattro Kush is a harmonious combination of various elements. Spicy, woody notes dominate upon inhaling, followed by a subtle sweetness reminiscent of pears, which helps balance the intensity. There are herbal undertones on the exhale with a touch of tea-like flavors. Effects Quattro Kush THCa Flower is known for its powerful effects, so users should be prepared for an intense experience. It is popular among experienced cannabis enthusiasts who seek a more potent strain. Still, it can also be enjoyed by beginners in smaller doses. As an Indica-dominant strain, Quattro Kush delivers a profoundly relaxing and calming high. Users can expect a head-emptying effect that promotes a carefree and blissful state of mind upon consumption. The strain has euphoric properties that can induce laughter and make social interactions more enjoyable. Additionally, Quattro Kush stimulates appetite, so users may experience the case of munchies. It can be an excellent choice for relaxed gatherings with friends or indulging in stoned cooking sessions. Quattro Kush is best suited for expe

If you’re looking for a strain to keep you sharp, inspired, and ready to tackle the day, this classic South African gem is it. Whether it’s an outdoor adventure or powering through your to-do list, Durban Poison is your perfect daytime companion. Shop now for vibrant, terpene-rich buds from Hemp Hop. Durban Poison Strain Highlights Type: Pure Sativa (100% Sativa) Origin: South African landrace strain brought to the U.S. by Ed Rosenthal in the 1970s Appearance: Round, chunky buds dense with frosty trichomes Flavors: Sweet citrus, herbal pine Aroma: Earthy, pine, spicy, slightly pungent sweetness THCa Levels: 22.31% Effects: Creative, focused, euphoric, happy What is Durban Poison Strain? Durban Poison THCa Flower is a rare find — a true pure sativa that delivers a clear, lively head high. It was first discovered in Durban, South Africa, and brought back to the U.S. by cannabis pioneer Ed Rosenthal. Decades later, it’s still famous for sparking creativity, sharpening focus, and lifting moods without dragging down your energy. From artists to busy professionals, Durban Poison remains a trusted pick for staying productive and upbeat. Durban Poison Strain Cannabinoids THCa - 22.31% THCv - 0.77% Total Cannabinoids - 24.32% Durban Poison Strain Terpenes Terpinolene Myrcene Ocimene Durban Poison THCa Effects Expect a quick-hitting head rush that lights up your mind: Boosts creativity and mental clarity Promotes euphoria without couch-lock Keeps you focused and happy Great for social events, outdoor activities, or knocking out chores Perfect for those who want energy and positivity to carry them through daylight hours. Phenotype Durban Poison buds are chunky and round, showing off dense clusters packed with milky trichomes. The bright green flowers come alive with sweet, earthy, and piney notes that tease what’s inside. Why Choose Hemp Hop for Durban Poison Strain? Hemp Hop works directly with cultivators who honor the heritage of classic strains like Durban Poison.
